title: Icon Aria-Hidden, Shimmer & Color Token Fixes
description: Add missing aria-hidden to decorative icons in OfferNegotiationPanel and ShareTimeline, replace animate-pulse loading skeletons in JobRecommendations and JobBoardContent with shimmer, replace hardcoded amber color classes in EmailVerificationBanner with design tokens, fix SettingsNotificationsSection hardcoded gray class, replace AnalyticsCharts hardcoded CHART_COLORS hex array with CSS variables, and fix JobBoardContent BriefcaseSvg inline color values.

userStories.title: Add aria-hidden to decorative Copy icon in OfferNegotiationPanel
userStories.description: OfferNegotiationPanel.jsx renders a Copy icon in a button that already has a visible or aria-label based accessible name. The icon is decorative and should have aria-hidden='true' to prevent duplicate announcement.
acceptanceCriteria: OfferNegotiationPanel.jsx Copy icon has aria-hidden='true'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-hidden to decorative icons in ShareTimeline
userStories.description: ShareTimeline.jsx renders Link2Off (line ~74) and Link2 (line ~95) icons without aria-hidden='true'. These are decorative status icons — the button or container already conveys the meaning through text or aria-label. Add aria-hidden='true' to both icons.
acceptanceCriteria: ShareTimeline.jsx Link2Off icon has aria-hidden='true'
ShareTimeline.jsx Link2 icon has aria-hidden='true'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace JobRecommendations animate-pulse skeleton with shimmer
userStories.description: JobRecommendations.jsx loading skeleton uses animate-pulse bg-muted (line ~46) instead of the project-standard shimmer-bg animate-shimmer. Replace the pulse skeleton with shimmer classes to match the loading pattern used throughout the app.
acceptanceCriteria: JobRecommendations.jsx loading skeleton uses shimmer-bg animate-shimmer instead of animate-pulse bg-muted
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace JobBoardContent animate-pulse skeleton with shimmer
userStories.description: JobBoardContent.jsx loading skeleton (line ~11) uses animate-pulse bg-muted instead of the project-standard shimmer-bg animate-shimmer. Replace with shimmer classes.
acceptanceCriteria: JobBoardContent.jsx loading skeleton uses shimmer-bg animate-shimmer instead of animate-pulse bg-muted
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace EmailVerificationBanner hardcoded amber colors with design tokens
userStories.description: EmailVerificationBanner.jsx uses many hardcoded Tailwind amber-* color classes (border-amber-200, bg-amber-50, text-amber-600, hover:text-amber-900, etc.) that bypass the design token system and do not respond to theme changes. Replace with appropriate semantic tokens (bg-warning/10, text-warning, border-warning/30 or equivalents available in the project's tailwind config).
acceptanceCriteria: EmailVerificationBanner.jsx does not use hardcoded amber-* Tailwind classes
Colors are replaced with semantic design tokens from the project's theme
Visual appearance is equivalent (warning/amber tone)
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace SettingsNotificationsSection hardcoded gray-100 with design token
userStories.description: SettingsNotificationsSection.jsx uses dark:bg-gray-100 (a hardcoded Tailwind gray) instead of a design token. Replace with the appropriate token (e.g. dark:bg-muted or dark:bg-card) from the project's theme.
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsNotificationsSection.jsx does not use dark:bg-gray-100 or other hardcoded gray-* classes
The replacement uses a design token consistent with the project's color system
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace AnalyticsCharts CHART_COLORS hardcoded hex values with CSS variables
userStories.description: AnalyticsCharts.jsx defines CHART_COLORS as an array of hardcoded hex strings (e.g. '#d97757', '#6a9bcc', etc.). These don't respond to theme changes. Replace with CSS variable references (e.g. 'hsl(var(--chart-1))') or use the project's existing chart color tokens if defined. If no chart CSS vars exist, define them in the tailwind config or index.css to match the existing hex values.
acceptanceCriteria: AnalyticsCharts.jsx CHART_COLORS does not contain hardcoded hex strings
Colors reference CSS variables (hsl(var(--chart-N))) or equivalent design tokens
Chart colors render identically to the current palette
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Fix JobBoardContent BriefcaseSvg hardcoded inline SVG colors
userStories.description: JobBoardContent.jsx BriefcaseSvg component has hardcoded fill and stroke color values (#fae4d4, #d97757, #eeac80) as inline SVG attributes. These don't adapt to theme changes. Replace with CSS variables or use className with design token colors.
acceptanceCriteria: JobBoardContent.jsx BriefcaseSvg does not use hardcoded hex fill/stroke attributes
Colors reference CSS variables or Tailwind classes using design tokens
The SVG visual appearance is equivalent
Build passes with no errors
